action.reasoning: Observation: best_v2.pt has 'node_emb.weight' with shape [512,9] - this is a LINEAR layer (nn.Linear weight is [out,in]), but current model.py names linear encoding layers 'node_enc'/'edge_enc'. This naming mismatch prevents loading. Time remaining: ~43 min. Analysis: Fix model.py to use 'node_emb'/'edge_emb' for linear encoding (matching checkpoint keys), fix predict.py auto-detection to use weight shapes, then resume training from best_v2.pt for ~30 epochs with EMA. The model was still improving at epoch 60 (val AP 0.2266, test AP 0.2136). Decision: Fix naming, resume with EMA, train 30 epochs, submit eval.
